history_window.rule: Newest relevant matching execution within the previous 3 calendar months

skipped_rows: Status Boost - no Ops config task on the live MM row
Lotto peak - no Ops config task; represented by the LBP task
BACKUP 30/50% Coin Coupon - backup only, not live

tasks.source_row_name: 2026-08-01 | RYD - 5* Gold Card + 100% SB - High Price

Production

End: 2026-08-02 11:00 UTC

Pricing: High.

Reuse: YES - reuse the recent High-price 100% SB RYD shell from 2026-05-18 (Ops item 11977017447). Current delta: replace 3000 Globez with a 5* Gold Card and update dates. Creative is also marked Reuse on the MM calendar.

- Ops config must use the current approved RYD pricing/config; do not copy older pre-May tasks.
